rationale: Educ. Code §49.052 governs consolidated district agreements under Subchapter D, Chapter 13. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Except to the extent modified by the terms of the agreement, the consolidated district is governed by the applicable provisions of Subchapter D, Chapter 13, other than a provision requiring consolidating districts to be contiguous.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns consolidated district governance and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
